name: Module — AACR tracker
what_it_solves: Group entity for the AACR 2026 lead-tracker family: session navigation, GTM bridge, faceted filtering, schema-A master JSON, and lead audit tracker CSV.
how_it_solves: Declared as a grouper so per-file entities in the AACR family can cross-reference a single owner.
why_it_exists: Prevents 19 dangling cross_refs across v2 brenus stream; makes 'the AACR tracker' addressable as one entity.
